name: chairman-pullquote
comment: BODY:Pull Quote paragraph from sample.idml story u29b83 (chairman page). Open Sans Italic 8pt. Reference line breaks read from sample.pdf via pdftotext -layout (page 5).

spec.text: Magnim incto coresci isciatur sam vellibust autatia consequiam aut proreri andit, cus magnis es est, volor rest inullestibus aut dit mincimin numqui optis alis iunt es sum reritio reicipi ciaepero consed quo mod quidus sunt.
